before_body:
## Allowed Paths
- `src/main.ts`
- `tests/main.test.ts`

## In Scope
- `src/main.ts` と `tests/main.test.ts` の既存修正を維持する

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AC1: Existing scope remains stable
